case_title: LEASECOMM CORPORATION vs. NILAN, CHARLIE et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT NILAN, CHARLIE U.S. QUEBAUGH INC.
